identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Data density without clutter. Technical beauty.

theme_strategy.vibe: The Control Room - High visibility, low noise

semantic_rules: Never use solid backgrounds for badges unless selected.
Use 'subtle' backgrounds (bg-opacity-10) with strong borders for status indicators.
Missing variants should look like 'empty slots' waiting to be filled (dashed borders).

layout_system.grid_strategy: The Bento Grid - Mode B (Control Room)

modal_structure.footer: flex-none border-t border-zinc-100 pt-4 mt-4 flex justify-end gap-3

modal.style: rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-zinc-200 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/95

variant_card.style: group relative flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border transition-all duration-200
variant_card.state_missing: border-dashed border-orange-300 bg-orange-50/30 hover:bg-orange-50 hover:border-orange-400 cursor-pointer

badges.style: rounded-md px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/20 rounded-lg px-6
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-lg

micro_interactions: Hovering a missing variant should 'fill' the dashed border to solid to imply creation.
Use a subtle 'pulse' animation on the 'Scrape Missing' button if data is incomplete.
Progress bars for 'Sync Status' should be slim (h-1.5) and rounded-full.
textures: Use a very subtle 'noise' texture on the modal background to reduce digital flatness.
Use 1px grid lines between comparison rows instead of heavy borders.

icons.style: stroke-[1.5px] w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REFACTOR: Break down the monolithic modal into smaller sub-components: `VariantRow`, `StatusBadge`, `ComparisonHeader`.
2. VISUAL HIERARCHY: The 'Missing' variants are the HERO of this story. They represent lost revenue. Highlight them with the dashed-orange pattern defined in component_specs.
3. DATA DENSITY: Do not use cards for the main list. Use a 'List-Grid' hybrid. Rows are better for comparison than cards.
4. ACTIONS: The 'Create Variants' button should be disabled until selection is made. Show a counter badge inside the button (e.g., 'Create 3 Variants').
5. EMPTY STATES: If all variants are synced, show a 'Success' state with a clean illustration or icon, don't just show an empty list.
6. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure keyboard navigation works within the modal. Focus states must be 'ring-2 ring-slate-900 ring-offset-2'.
7. TESTING: Add data-testid to the 'Create' button, the 'Select All' checkbox, and individual variant rows.

do_not: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not use default scrollbars in the modal body (use 'scrollbar-thin').
Do not center align the comparison text (keep it left-aligned for scanning).
must_do: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any SKU or ID displayed.
Ensure the modal has a fixed height on desktop but is responsive on mobile.
